h70333661g5321g4ccdgbbcdgd99a3d1550e9: We're ready to head to your camp - are you?
hfc88b5f9gfafag4e1ag83c1gc15d2b29b164: You've proven most helpful. I thank you. Truly.
hf5151a9fg995dg425dgb57cg69997eaad51a: Ready at last. Gods, how I've waited for this day.
hd0505504g0b9fg47f2ga8b9g313b04c5728a: I think... I think that's the last of them.
h3ed93994g27d2g4c4eg967ag0ea70f05d765: Gods, it's done. It's over. Just... just give me a moment.
he5b8df6fgf21dg445dg8ddegc8f7dc754d28: Well, are you ready? Are we?
ha90ca686g9370g44cdgb3c7gf847494a7265: From what little I've learned of goblins, they won't resist an invitation like that.
ha7db1c59geba3g4699g95aagef2b2c3a4960: Take me through the plan again.
h335eebfagd663g47c5g9853g259a46de404c: I wish it were as complicated as all that.
he463afeeg81c0g4745ga310g6958091799ca: This drow is no fool - she knows the smart thing is to be patient, starve us out.
he76f4f2dge3d1g4f1ag8254gc89d550ee085: I mean to prick at her pride - give her no choice but to be stupid. Sound the horn - let's have this done.
hdc64aba3g2037g4309ga206gc1a27ca408a5: Not yet - I need more time.
hdc364b1ag1228g4dc3g9485g8155b319eb4c: Do what you must, but quickly. Once you sound the horn, they'll come running.
h9cb6c934gc35ag4427ga835g4fe317b91b80: I'd sooner start this on our terms than theirs.
hd89e7cd6gbe89g4d0cg8c76gfe91a47a0780: You can understand why we've had to be cautious at the gates.
habfb5cd0g5a62g4669g891ag20315a489db9: When the Blade told me of what you'd done, I was loathe to believe it.
h181c468fg7a23g45d0gab40g8faed7cba92f: I'm glad to see you haven't ruined everything I've worked so hard for.
h22d09e08g1cdag4be2gb435g0f469e0670b8: I know we can make a stand here. We have to. Your help will be welcome.
h78692a3bgc0a1g4be2gb610g65438b56ff11: I'm glad to see his fears weren't as bad as he imagined.
h3ed466aega39eg4e06g8155gb17951ea1e30: I'd given you up for dead at the goblin camp - I'm damn glad to be wrong.
h9edf40ceg55beg4fabg9d4fg08dd034c66b1: Provided that I can rely on your continued discretion, of course.
hdb823d37g063bg4a16g8556gca66467571a9: But what happened? We've seen them massing in the woods.
hca5bd86ag5a77g41cfgbb85gcec64008d936: I met the drow leading them - and led her here.
h9832e9b1gb440g4dc1gbc01g4a4d38708646: You told her where to find us? In all the Nine Hells - why?
ha16d223cg9d26g4332g9e0fg9ed3bf007685: What's the problem? You both serve the Absolute, don't you?
h3c033557ga0b6g47ddg8fc6gf654f93037b1: Allegiance is a murky thing, particularly for a drow.
h7d059a5cg64e7g49d9g9832ge1a4cb37977f: These people are mine. She can't have them. I can count on your help, can't I?
h1579e5a3ge5f2g42cbgb01bgeb954430ebae: Calm down. She's walking into a trap.
h2736544cgaccdg41cdg926cgb04917b26869: Quite a risk - though she does pose a threat to everything I've worked for.
haed3d4bcg20ffg4f4dg8292gcf0fb11d5373: I'm not given to gambling, but it seems you've forced my hand.
h80f2dd38gd467g4281g85c7gcf0a6ca76e94: I take comfort knowing your fate is tied to mine, at least. So let's be about it, shall we?
h7f2c2990g6a2ag4aaeg8cfcg731f6b819765: You're still begging for my help? Really?
h0a5f2189g68b0g44cag8ad2gcba81ce8bc6f: Prove your trustworthiness, and I'll prove an invaluable ally. That I can guarantee.
hdc9a2123g5633g4ea7g8e1dgf94968542f22: You led the drow here? By the Nine Hells, why?
hb73c504eg5c28g4b34g810fg7e27682358c3: She tricked the location out of me. It was a mistake - but I mean to make up for it.
h1bdfd818g7a20g4a55gb516g330b3770b8d1: A mistake? It's a damned - gods damn it, we're not ready for this.
hd57a5c87g10d6g420dga601g70e085b3e0f8: Trust me - she thinks we're on the same side.
h7a66ab57gd4b7g4c0cgae6egdaee9b2128c9: Our trap? I can't help but feel that we're the ones backed into a corner.
h8e65cd2eg6ac7g4cf2gbc84g58ca24f80620: But... if you say you're a match for this drow, I suppose that's the best chance we have.
hdda37727g2ed9g4742g8560g5b276e227c26: The horn. If you seek to draw her in, that damned thing's loud as thunder. It'll give our people a chance to take shelter, too.
he623fb72gf918g4c3ag8f1fg20688f53dac3: Relax - this is a trap, and now she's walking right into it.
h3f5edcbbg076bg41f1gb51dgb0df75882235: So... what? We're to be bait for this drow? Gods above, I...
h176b8ecbgb80ag4f33gbfe1gc6690c3e0826: If this is what it has come to, then... so be it. You'll need to draw her attention.
h9dc05ac1g1105g4126g8d08gbd0b34aa2016: The horn- damn thing's loud as thunder. It'll give our people a chance to take shelter, too.
h03ab9ec3ge53cg4718g8341g7bbff72e0e40: Simple. This grove belongs to the Absolute now.
h43d9b73ag2cfdg40afg9b78gbe6fe87973d8: The goblins are coming - and they're led by a drow.
h60a69e8bg5529g4fc7gbcfeg70358c72719f: Truly? Hells, I didn't expect her to... we were almost ready to leave.
h664a5661gc4abg44c7g966ag988e989e36a8: Well. There's nothing for it, now - a fight it will have to be.
h522ebfd6gd1dag48ccg96cbgb5aab8c34d83: We threw them back once. If you're with us... perhaps we can do it again.
h546c59c6gfe8fg4588ga336ga016f5445782: No point waiting around then. What do you need?
h88939af6gd548g44e5g8bd5g9aba35c1d6ba: We need to thin the goblin numbers quickly if we're to have any chance of survival.
h1e3f9271g0338g4ce3gb476g991d678e510f: Every ounce of oil that we could spare has been buried out in front of the gate.
hda395e9eg9631g4433gb17eg59e650377282: We'll blow the horn to draw them in, and pray our fire-arrows strike true.
hf405cf21gacb6g4e8bga27eg520b0147a1c5: A challenge for all to witness. She'll have a hard time resisting.
h725ccfc7g3e1cg4989ga9a5g6f28a301284e: Good. She's expecting to find us weak and desperate - and she's not wrong.
h7efa759bg89beg45c5g8a32g22c874178a1c: But she'll find you waiting, too.
h2a064601g4006g40eeg9a2eg74b5d9f9eb5c: See to your preparations and then sound the horn. Let's have this done.
h095c2908g2143g410bgb019gd7c97298eb13: I can't tell if that's a really good plan, or an awful one.
h44055122g1808g49efga73bg0e3b74cb8d61: Your courage is catching, it seems. Or perhaps I've finally lost my reason.
hb95d5803ge4d4g47fagbb86g598a52fd2401: Make what preparations you deem necessary, and then sound the horn. Let's have this done.
ha8886a99gf7dfg41cdgb3c5gad6ee584375f: Don't you want to kill your rival up close?
h11faf32fg1058g4b9dg8a01gf227bf411d31: If I were half a warrior then I wouldn't need you, would I?
ha1da7de4g4129g4852g99c8gf5995a588409: Don't do anything stupid, hm? Remember that our fates are intertwined - either she dies, or we do.
hbd8561a0g77bag4b53g8a41g0bcbb858aa27: Believe me, I've prayed to find one - but the gods have seen fit to stay out of this.
h18aea318gc495g4c48g87c8gf4298fe57d00: You haven't - and so we place our faith in you instead.
h44fab500g43e3g45efgafcbg9b45990e9c4c: Hah. What I have is no choice - we need to thin their numbers quickly if we're to survive.
h68c0c786g3c79g4829gbb2agf9b5a59c78f8: You've fortified the place well - we're ready for them.
h0dc8a09ag92d3g4d92ga72ag85a70c015e50: We have the barricades - just not the warriors to man them. If we're to survive, we'll need to thin the goblin numbers quickly.
hc591d178g7682g4bddga0ddg1e3b71b1b4cb: With you? You misunderstand - I'm with them.
h9a115d91g0fc9g4c4bg96b8gca5762cfbf91: You've thrown away everything I worked for! Why?
he12fb0e7g3f56g47bfg9f29g30f9a6481999: I follow a god of death. That requires the occasional offering.
h85caf7f2g40a1g4bbbg8e61ge19ee195a69c: Your 'god' will be flattened under the Absolute.
h7976d795g59c3g4fc2gb47bg1071c644632d: Don't look for reasons - it's nothing personal.
h8975c09ag924ag4ef2ga53fgc85eab8c686d: Why? For the glory of the Absolute, of course!
h22761023g1068g4273gb9c3gf051ff34b4de: You wouldn't know the first thing about the Absolute. Believe you me.
h4c255831gf732g4939g88a6g528ac5bc60f4: I didn't turn on anyone. I look out for myself.
haf8235a4g6484g46bdg87c4g3c7e780ac87c: Take heart. My god is watching over us.
h9cda6eabgefdag4b0cgba75g533fb1f77949: I suspect we'll need it before the day is done. The fact is, we cannot withstand a siege.
h477c75edg5a15g4ffbg9722g5daa0791a638: If it's to be battle, sooner is better than later. We need to ready ourselves and goad this drow into attacking.
h7f5739f9g7378g4f8egbafagabbad2029d5c: Take heart. My god is watching over us.
h973c5fecga984g465fga0e2g31a27d5be840: Their drow leader found the grove. I couldn't stop it - I'm sorry.
hed3e2422g4fd1g43ecg9d7agb4103875d077: Mrag. It... it doesn't matter now, I suppose. You have nothing to apologise for.
he2ab130dg0fc4g4848ga237g8b3d9be77668: If it must be bloodshed after all, I'm glad to have you with us.
h2e26556bg79ffg4660g8e6agf0768fe123cb: We've spotted goblins in the woods - what happened at their camp?
h9b2c0859gc3c3g4bb8gae70g39afb41fc079: Gods above, you're alive. A little light, just as the day seems darkest.
h2abbc09dg5840g4346g855fga0fc9d3b0139: Gods! You have a habit of turning up where you're least expected - but no less welcome for that.
